zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

auditor.persona_contract: This Stage-0 record is a PRE-AUDIT SELF-CHECK authored by claude-orchestrator. It is NOT the formal Hawkeye-Stage0 audit. The formal audit MUST be dispatched as an INDEPENDENT subagent (separate ID, given only the artifact files and audit criteria, no chat-history context) before stage-exit. This pre-audit identifies known issues for the independent auditor to verify. Independence rule per skill-system: 'Hawkeye cannot be the same role that authored or content-approved the audited item.' This pre-audit is permitted as a quality-gate self-check; the independent audit is the binding decision.
decision_rights: force rework beads for process gaps
auditor.independence_rule: VIOLATED IN THIS RECORD — this record is a self pre-audit. Binding audit is HAWKEYE-WEALTHCOM-001-stage0-independent (forthcoming subagent dispatch).

findings.title: Independence rule violated for this self pre-audit
findings.description: This record is authored by claude-orchestrator (the same persona that authored the records under audit). Skill-system mandates Hawkeye persona ≠ authoring persona. Therefore this is a SELF PRE-AUDIT, not the binding Hawkeye audit. Binding audit (HAWKEYE-WEALTHCOM-001-stage0-independent) MUST be dispatched as an independent subagent before stage-exit.
findings.remediation: Dispatch Hawkeye-stage0 as a separate general-purpose subagent given only the artifact files (no chat-history). Subagent generates a binding audit record. This self pre-audit becomes input to that audit, not a substitute.

findings.title: PRD-atom and domain-brief outputs not yet present
findings.description: Stage-0 acceptance requires PRD atoms with self-grep verification (TB-002, in flight) AND a domain brief (re-dispatch needed after INC-002). Without these, the binding Hawkeye audit cannot pass evidence_discipline axis fully.
findings.remediation: Allow TB-002 subagent to complete; re-dispatch domain research with smaller-per-section scope; re-run Hawkeye after both arrive.

findings.title: validate_*.py scripts referenced but not yet executed
findings.description: Multiple records reference validate_tasks_md.py, validate_tpm_flow.py, validate_knowledge_graph.py, validate_engagement_governance.py, etc. These scripts live under df-meta-attractor/scripts and df-governance-mayor/scripts. They have not been executed in this commit.
findings.remediation: Independent Hawkeye subagent should attempt to run each validator (or document why it cannot). If scripts are mock-only, document that in F-003 mitigation note.

findings.title: Some forthcoming records named but not yet created
findings.description: DF-instantiation-record references CG-WEALTHCOM-001 control-graph and RFG-WEALTHCOM-001 refinery gate as 'forthcoming'. These are correctly deferred to stage-architecture and first-artifact-acceptance respectively, but the deferral should be tracked.
findings.remediation: Already tracked in dark-factory-instantiation-record §missing_or_waived_controls. No additional action needed; will be created at the cited stages.

findings.title: Skill survey says 14 bundles; user said '16 meta skills and skills'
findings.description: User wording ambiguous; 14 bundles confirmed by Glob of C:\Users\abhir\version2\. ASM-006 logged.

overall_decision_rationale: All Stage-0 records are project-tailored, internally consistent, cross-referenced by ID, and contain no template_marker:true on production fields. The slop incident (INC-001) was caught and quarantined; corrective re-dispatch is in flight. The independence rule for Hawkeye is acknowledged and the binding independent audit is queued (TB-WC-2026-0425-003). Self-pass authorizes the orchestrator to: (a) await PRD/domain subagents, (b) dispatch independent Hawkeye, (c) prepare checkpoint-#1 prompt. Self-pass does NOT authorize transition past checkpoint-#1 — that requires client approval AND binding Hawkeye audit pass.
next_action: Per F-001 remediation: after PRD atoms self-grep verified AND domain brief re-extracted, dispatch independent Hawkeye-stage0-independent subagent. Expected verdict: pass or conditional_pass with named patches.
signed_by: claude-orchestrator (self pre-audit only — NOT a binding Hawkeye signature)
